templates.template: The person with the drink with the least ice drinks {Y} sips
Anyone who has bought a round today deals {Y} sips
The first one to clink their glass on the table drinks {Y} sips
{X} must go and ask the bartender for a napkin; if they don't, drink {Y} sips
The person keeping track of how much we've spent drinks {Y} sips for being responsible
Anyone who has ever picked someone up in this bar deals {Y} sips
The person who knows the name of the server who attended us deals {Y} sips
If you are drinking beer, deal {Y} sips
If you are drinking a mixed drink or cocktail, drink {Y} sips
The last person to raise their glass and say 'CHEERS!' drinks {Y} sips
{X} must guess how much the cheapest drink in the bar costs or drink {Y} sips
Anyone who has gone to the bathroom in the last 10 minutes drinks {Y} sips
The first person to name 3 different brands of whiskey deals {Y} sips
If the group decides that {X} is the one who can drink the most, deal {Y} sips
Anyone sitting on a bar stool drinks {Y} sips
The person who suggested coming to this bar drinks {Y} sips for their choice
{X} must try to toss a piece of paper into an empty glass or drink {Y} sips
Anyone who has already finished their drink drinks {Y} sips
The person with the fullest glass right now deals {Y} sips
The last person to touch the bar counter drinks {Y} sips
Anyone who has been to this bar more than 5 times deals {Y} sips for being a regular
{X} must name 5 ingredients of a Mojito in 10 seconds or drink {Y} sips
The person who has the song currently playing in their playlist deals {Y} sips
Anyone who is behaving 'too well' according to the group drinks {Y} sips
The first person to say the name of 3 different types of beer deals {Y} sips
{X} must imitate an overworked bartender or drink {Y} sips
Anyone who has eaten some snacks (chips, nuts...) drinks {Y} sips
The person with the least phone battery deals {Y} sips
If the bar has a terrace and we are inside, everyone drinks {Y} sips
The person who can wink at someone at another table without them getting mad deals {Y} sips
Anyone who has ordered a glass of water today drinks {Y} sips for being sensible
{X} must name 3 brands of gin in 5 seconds or drink {Y} sips
The last person to touch something blue drinks {Y} sips
Anyone who prefers rum over gin drinks {Y} sips
{X} must tell a funny story that happened to them in a bar. If no one laughs, drink {Y} sips.
The person who has gone the longest without letting go of their phone drinks {Y} sips
Anyone who has a visible tattoo deals {Y} sips
The first person to point to a bathroom deals {Y} sips
{X} must try to convince someone from another table to say hi to the group or drink {Y} sips
Anyone who has ever worked in hospitality deals {Y} sips for being a veteran
The person who knows what an 'Old Fashioned' is deals {Y} sips
Anyone wearing sunglasses (even on their head) drinks {Y} sips
{X} must try to guess what {PLAYER2} is going to order next or drink {Y} sips
The person with the emptiest glass must go and order the next round or drink {Y} sips
Anyone drinking something non-alcoholic drinks {Y} sips for being healthy
The last person to touch their own drink drinks {Y} sips
{X} must name 3 typical party songs in 10 seconds or drink {Y} sips
Anyone dancing, even while sitting, deals {Y} sips
The person with the most keys in their pocket drinks {Y} sips
Everyone raises their glass, toasts to the night, and drinks {Y} sips
